title: Current repository skeleton
summary: The repository currently contains a FastAPI scaffold, core models, and tests.
open_questions: How should persistent storage be introduced in milestone 2?

title: Role sessions must be isolated
summary: Each role should start a new session and reconstruct context from files.
open_questions: Which files should every session read by default?

title: First research pass must be full-spectrum
summary: The first research round must include internal materials, git history, competitors, and methodology.
open_questions: How should external references be normalized into project files?

title: Git history should become a first-class project source
summary: Project evolution, milestone intent, and implementation evidence should be captured from git history.
open_questions: Which commit metadata should be surfaced in the knowledge center?

title: Comparable agent systems use files as durable memory
summary: Adjacent systems demonstrate the value of file-backed state, session transcripts, and replayable work history.
open_questions: Which external workflow patterns should be adopted or deferred for V1?

title: Structured handoff is required for role-to-role continuity
summary: Planning and delivery systems are more stable when each step produces an explicit handoff with success criteria and risks.
open_questions: How strict should handoff validation be in the first release?

title: The landing story must match the execution model
summary: The public-facing first impression should derive from the same product hook and workflow model used internally.
open_questions: Which workflow step should be shown in the first visual preview?

title: A narrated demo should reuse the same claims as the landing and PRD
summary: The product walkthrough should use the same promise, mechanism, and governance story as the blueprint package.
open_questions: Which step should be the first proof moment in the demo?
